## Excerpt (first 6 000 chars, docx)

__PROPOSED METHODOLOGY FOR AFC__

__AI Training, Digital Transformation Enablement, Practical Implementation and Post\-Implementation Support__

__Enhanced methodology focus__

This methodology integrates AFC inputs on digital transformation, process improvement alignment, differentiated training streams, hands\-on labs, pilot projects, LMS support, change management, AI governance and sustainability documentation\.

# 1\. Approach Overview

AI Institute Africa, in partnership with Rubiem Intelligence and the University of Zimbabwe, will adopt a practical, executive\-focused and impact\-driven methodology designed for AFC's operating environment\. The programme is aligned to AFC's digital transformation journey, process improvement work, corporate strategy and AI strategy\. It is designed to move participants from awareness and classroom learning into applied practice, pilot implementation and sustained adoption\.

The methodology remains structured around four connected phases, now strengthened with banking\-relevant capability building, technical environment readiness, change management and measurable implementation outputs:

- Phase 1: Classroom training, training readiness assessment and AFC needs alignment\.
- Phase 2: Online lessons, guided assignments, LMS\-enabled tracking and knowledge checks\.
- Phase 3: Practical exercises, applied workshops and pilot project design using AFC\-relevant banking scenarios\.
- Phase 4: Post\-implementation support, coaching, change management, reporting and sustainability documentation\.
